text:
Я редко пишу плохие отзывы. Но об отношении в этом месте я обязан сообщит всем. Это ужасное обслуживание. Мы делали бесплатный тест, результаты которого так и не получили на почту. Нас отправляли куда угодно, но тест мы так и не получили. Помогать нам никто из персонала не захотел. В ответ на наши просьбы мы слышали только крик и хамство. Я очень сожалею, что столкнулся с таким обслуживанием. Будьте и вы готовы, что сделав тест вы ничего не получите и вам еще нахамят и будут на вас кричать.

I really write bad reviews. But I am obliged to inform everyone about the attitude in this place. This service is terrible. We did a free test, the results of which were never received by mail. We were sent anywhere, but we never got the test. None of the staff wanted to help us. In response to our requests, we heard only shouting and rudeness. I am very sorry to have encountered such a service. Be prepared, too, that by doing the test you will not get anything and they will get nasty and yell at you.

translations.sr:
Retko pišem loše recenzije. Ali o odnosu na ovom mestu moram da obavestim sve. Usluga je užasna. Radili smo besplatan test, čije rezultate nikada nismo dobili na mejl. Slali su nas svuda, ali test nikada nismo dobili. Niko od osoblja nije hteo da nam pomogne. Na naše molbe čuli smo samo vikanje i bahatost. Veoma žalim što sam se susreo sa takvom uslugom. Budite i vi spremni da kada uradite test nećete ništa dobiti, a još će vam i nahamiti i vikati na vas.

I really write bad reviews. But I am obliged to inform everyone about the attitude in this place. This service is terrible. We did a free test, the results of which were never received by mail. We were sent anywhere, but we never got the test. None of the staff wanted to help us. In response to our requests, we heard only shouting and rudeness. I am very sorry to have encountered such a service. Be prepared, too, that by doing the test you will not get anything and they will get nasty and yell at you.
translations.sr_cyrl:
Ретко пишем лоше рецензије. Али о односу на овом месту морам да обавестим све. Услуга је ужасна. Радили смо бесплатан тест, чије резултате никада нисмо добили на мејл. Слали су нас свуда, али тест никада нисмо добили. Нико од особља није хтео да нам помогне. На наше молбе чули смо само викање и бахатост. Веома жалим што сам се сусрео са таквом услугом. Будите и ви спремни да када урадите тест нећете ништа добити, а још ће вам и нахамити и викати на вас.

We were sent anywhere, but we never got the test. None of the staff wanted to help us. In response to our requests, we heard only shouting and rudeness. I am very sorry to have encountered such a service. Be prepared, too, that by doing the test you will not get anything and they will get nasty and yell at you.
translations.en:
I rarely write bad reviews. But I am obliged to inform everyone about the attitude in this place. The service is terrible. We did a free test, the results of which we never received by email. They sent us everywhere, but we never got the test results. None of the staff wanted to help us. In response to our requests, we heard only shouting and rudeness. I deeply regret having encountered such service. Be prepared that after doing the test you will get nothing, and they will be rude to you and yell at you.

translations.de:
Ich schreibe selten schlechte Bewertungen. Aber über die Einstellung an diesem Ort muss ich alle informieren. Der Service ist schrecklich. Wir haben einen kostenlosen Test gemacht, dessen Ergebnisse wir nie per E-Mail erhalten haben. Man hat uns überallhin geschickt, aber den Test haben wir nie bekommen. Niemand vom Personal wollte uns helfen. Auf unsere Bitten hörten wir nur Geschrei und Unhöflichkeit. Es tut mir sehr leid, dass ich auf einen solchen Service gestoßen bin. Seien auch Sie darauf vorbereitet, dass Sie nach dem Test nichts bekommen und man Sie noch anpöbelt und anschreit.

We were sent anywhere, but we never got the test. None of the staff wanted to help us. In response to our requests, we heard only shouting and rudeness. I am very sorry to have encountered such a service. Be prepared, too, that by doing the test you will not get anything and they will get nasty and yell at you.
translations.tr:
Nadiren kötü yorum yazarım. Ama bu yerdeki tutum hakkında herkesi bilgilendirmek zorundayım. Hizmet korkunç. Ücretsiz bir test yaptırdık, sonuçlarını asla e-postayla alamadık. Bizi her yere gönderdiler ama testi asla alamadık. Personelden hiç kimse bize yardım etmek istemedi. Taleplerimize karşılık sadece bağırma ve kabalık duyduk. Böyle bir hizmetle karşılaştığım için çok üzgünüm. Siz de hazırlıklı olun, testi yaptırdıktan sonra hiçbir şey alamayacaksınız, üstelik size kaba davranacaklar ve bağıracaklar.
